nasb.text: But He answered them, “You give them something to eat!” And they *said to Him, “Shall we go and spend two hundred denarii on bread and give them something to eat?”

esv.text: But he answered them, “You give them something to eat.” And they said to him, “Shall we go and buy two hundred denarii worth of bread and give it to them to eat?”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答他們：“你們給他們吃吧！”門徒說：“要我們去買兩百銀幣的餅給他們吃嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你们给他们吃的吧。” 门徒说：“我们哪来这么多钱买东西给他们吃啊？”

csbs.text: 但耶稣回答他们，说：“你们给他们吃的吧。” 门徒们说：“要我们去买两百个银币的饼给他们吃吗？”
